# terrible_community_dns_adguardhome_rewrite (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain or wildcard domain that you want to be rewritten by AdGuardHome.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `answer` (String) Value for the domain rewrite. Required when `state=present`. Value can be a CNAME, A or AAAA record.
- `state` (String) Wether a rewrite rule should be added/updated (`state=present`) or removed (`state=absent`).

### Read-Only

- `rules` (String) The modified list of rewrite rules afte rewrite rule is applied.
